INSPECTRES.DebtModeWarning: Franchise is in Debt Mode — skill rolls are blocked.
INSPECTRES.MissionCompleteAnnounce: The mission is complete! Franchise dice have been distributed.
INSPECTRES.MissionEndedEarly: The mission ended early. Franchise pool cleared.
INSPECTRES.ErrorNoFranchise: No franchise actor found in this world.
INSPECTRES.ErrorStressRollFailed: Failed to apply stress roll to agent
INSPECTRES.DistributeDialogPoolChanged: Mission pool changed while the dialog was open. Please review the distribution and try again.
INSPECTRES.WarnSkillRollDebtMode: Skill rolls are blocked while in Debt Mode.
INSPECTRES.WarnStressRollDebtMode: Stress rolls are blocked while in Debt Mode.
INSPECTRES.WarnBankRollDebtMode: Bank rolls are disabled in Debt Mode.
INSPECTRES.WarnClientRollDebtMode: Client rolls are disabled in Debt Mode.

PenaltyNote.Minor: Reduce 1 die from one skill of your choice on your character sheet.
PenaltyNote.Major: Reduce 2 dice from one skill, or 1 die from each of two skills on your character sheet.
PenaltyNote.Meltdown: Meltdown! Cool dice reset to 0. Reduce {count} skill dice total (distributed as you choose) on your character sheet.

SkillRollNarration.Amazing: Player narrates the result in full detail
SkillRollNarration.Fair: Player narrates mostly positive but must include a complication
SkillRollNarration.NotGreat: GM narrates your fate; you may suggest one minor positive effect
SkillRollNarration.Bad: GM narrates your fate (or you may suggest something negative)
SkillRollNarration.Terrible: GM gets to hose you with a dire situation

StressRollNarration.TooCool: Gain 1 Cool die; no stress penalties
StressRollNarration.Annoyed: –1 die penalty to your next skill roll
StressRollNarration.Stressed: Lose 1 die from one skill of your choice
StressRollNarration.Frazzled: Lose 2 dice from one skill OR 1 die from each of two skills
StressRollNarration.Meltdown: Lose all Cool dice; lose skill dice equal to the number of stress dice you rolled

BankRollNarration.CompoundedInterest: Return this die + add 1 Bank die
BankRollNarration.ServiceCharge: Lose this die + 1 additional Bank die

DeathNarration.Maimed: Recovering from injuries for 2 in-game days
DeathNarration.Crippled: Recovering from injuries for 3 in-game days

INSPECTRES.WarnSkillRollRecovering: Agents out of action cannot roll.
INSPECTRES.WarnStressRollRecovering: Agents out of action cannot roll.
INSPECTRES.VacationBankHint: Spend Bank dice to reduce stress (1 die = 1 stress point). Agent has
INSPECTRES.WarnVacationDebtMode: Cannot take vacation while franchise is in debt.
INSPECTRES.InfoVacationNoStress: Agent has no stress to recover from.
INSPECTRES.InfoVacationNoSpending: No Bank dice spent. Agent stress unchanged.
INSPECTRES.BankruptcyExplain: Franchise Bank is depleted. Cards become inaccessible (seized as collateral). You may borrow up to
INSPECTRES.BankruptcyExplainSuffix: dice to continue play. You must repay the loan + 1 die interest by mission end.
INSPECTRES.WarnInsufficientRepayment: Insufficient earned dice for loan repayment.
INSPECTRES.NotifyFranchiseBankrupt: Franchise bankrupt! Must restart with new franchise.
INSPECTRES.WarnCantEnterDebtWithPositiveBank: Franchise must have zero or negative Bank to enter Debt Mode.
INSPECTRES.SettingCurrentDayHint: Current in-game day for recovery tracking. Agents recover based on this count.
INSPECTRES.SettingDevModeHint: Enable structured logging for mission sync, multiplayer coordination, and state changes. Check browser console.
INSPECTRES.ConfirmVacationBody: End mission and begin vacation? This will open the distribution dialog.
INSPECTRES.RecoveryNoteDead: Agent is permanently dead. Use Revive to restore.
INSPECTRES.RecoveryNoteRecovering: Agent returns to active duty on
INSPECTRES.TooltipBankRoll: Roll Bank dice to gain Franchise resources. Success = gain dice; Failure = gain nothing.
INSPECTRES.TooltipClientRoll: Roll Client dice to advance the mission. Success = earn mission dice; Failure = earn nothing.
INSPECTRES.TooltipSkillAcademics: Test knowledge-based investigations. Success = earn mission dice; Failure = GM narrates complications.
INSPECTRES.TooltipSkillAthletics: Test physical feats. Success = earn mission dice; Failure = GM narrates complications.
INSPECTRES.TooltipSkillTechnology: Test technical investigations. Success = earn mission dice; Failure = GM narrates complications.
INSPECTRES.TooltipSkillContact: Test social and networking investigations. Success = earn mission dice; Failure = GM narrates complications.
INSPECTRES.TooltipCharacteristicUsed: Mark as used if this characteristic was invoked during the roll. Used characteristics reduce stress penalty by 1.
